titleStmt.title: SII 8.370: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 370. (A.R. No. 89 of 1903).Figures of snakes are found ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi prava
¨rddhamāna mācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ jayantīpurada nelevīḍinalu sukasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁsaluktayireThis epithet and the followingsvasti are written above line 4, their correct place being indicated by a cross-mark.tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ sāvānigaḷadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ kannaḍa sandhivigrahi sēnādhipati daṇḍanāyakaṁ bhōga besasale
śrīmaccāḷukyavikramava¨rṣada 46-neya plavasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha 7 vaḍḍavāradaṁdu śrīmat
guttiya kōṭeya daṇḍanāyaka bhōgadēvayyaṁgaḷuṁ Alliyapāḷeyada rājādhyakṣa sāvāsiyara
śrīmat janā¨rddanabhaṭṭanāyakaU in written as in ṭelugu.Uttibhaṭṭanāyake bhōgibhaṭṭanāyakana ntivaruṁ sāvāsi śrīmat rājādhyakṣaṁ
nākarasa Apparasa sōvarasa Alliya kāhina nāyakaṁ cōvarasa mallarasa Intinibaru mi¨rddu kōṭeya jaṁtravāha
hollā jaṁge kāruṇyaṁgeydu jīvitamā¨rggadiṁ śāsānavaittiyā
gi kōṭeya kālvaḷḷigaḷanirusittaṟaluḷvari gadyāṇaṁ 10 tuppaṁ ko 10 kōṭa
ge nairityada gaṁganakalliṁ mūḍalu biṭṭa Erema 10 mane mānya Intidakke va
krastharādava¨rgge śrī billavarasa rāṇe [E]ṁdu koṭṭa
[dha¨rmaśāsana] .
Digital edition of SII 8.370 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
